person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Find a Grave Index:
Grace Sherman Livermore
BIRTH  18 Jun 1616
Dedham, Colchester Borough, Essex, England
DEATH  14 Jan 1691 (aged 74)
Chelmsford, Middlesex County, Massachusetts, USA
BURIAL  Forefathers Burial Ground
Chelmsford, Middlesex County, Massachusetts, USA  Show Map GPS-Latitude: 42.5974278, Longitude: -71.3540417
PLOT  FF/HIS-165-1
MEMORIAL ID  18168775 · View Source

Note: The surname is spelled Livermoar on her stone. Livermore is the spelling of the name that appears in most records. For search purposes, the spelling on this memorial will remain as Livermore.

NOTE: Regarding the death date -- Her date of death was Jan 14,1690/1, old style. And if you look really closely at the stone, there is a very tiny "1" to the upper right of the "90".

Her name appears repeatedly in the Colonial records as a midwife.

Grace was baptized June 18,1616 at Dedham, Co.Essex, England, the daughter of Edmund Sherman Jr and Grace (Makin) Sherman of Dedham, Co.Essex, and later of New Haven,CT. Older genealogies call Edmund's wife Joan Makin, but articles in The American Genealogist refute this supposition, and subsequent research published in The Great Migration Series (1995-2012) by Robert Charles Anderson, and an exhaustive study of the Sherman Family origins in England published in NEHGR up to Jan 2014 provide clarity to the family origins and identities.

Children: Hannah Livermore Coolidge, John Livermore Jr, Samuel Livermore, Daniel Livermore, an infant daughter, Mary Livermore, Sarah Livermore Townsend, Nathaniel Livermore, Martha Livermore Parker, and Edmund Livermore.

Gravesite Details
Earliest existing headstone in Forefather's Burial Ground. The stone appears to say she died 1690, but a close look reveals a very small "1" to the upper right of e zero, reflecting a detah date of Jan 14,1690/1, old style.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Grace Sherman於1615年6月18日出生在英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆時，她的父親Edmund Sherman44歲，母親Grace Makin38歲。她於1632年與John Livermore Sr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1690年1月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可傑爾姆斯福德享年74歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可傑爾姆斯福德福法黑斯 布利亞爾 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Grace Sherman于1615年6月18日出生在英国英格兰艾可迪德哈姆时，她的父亲Edmund Sherman44岁，母亲Grace Makin38岁。她于1632年与John Livermore Sr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1690年1月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可傑爾姆斯福德享年74岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可傑爾姆斯福德福法黑斯 布利亞爾 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Sherman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London): occupational name denoting someone who used shears to trim the surface of finished cloth and remove excessive nap, from Middle English sherman, shirman, sharman ‘shearman’.
Americanized form of North German Schürmann (see Schuermann ) and of German or Jewish (Ashkenazic) Schermann .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a tailor, from Yiddish sher ‘scissors’ + man ‘man’.

variants.name: Schuermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Franz, Guenter, Hans, Heiner, Klaus, Kurt, Udo.

North German (Schürmann): habitational name for someone from a place called Schüre(n), or a topographic name for someone who lived by a barn, from Middle Low German schüre ‘barn’. Compare Schurmann , Sherman , and Shurman .

variants.name: Shearer
meanings: Scottish and English: occupational name for a reaper of standing crops, a sheep shearer, or someone who used shears to trim the surface of finished cloth and remove excessive nap, from Middle English sherer(e) ‘shearer’, an agent derivative of Middle English schere(n) ‘to shear’. Middle English schere denoted shears and scissors of all sizes. Compare Sherman .
Americanized form of German or Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Scherer   or   Scherrer  , cognates of 1 above. Compare   Sharrer  .

variants.name: Shearman
meanings: English: variant of   Sherman  . The surname is also established in Ireland (Kilkenny).

nameMeanings.name: Grace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun (via Old French, from Latin gratia), this name occurs occasionally in the 15th century, and by the 1540s was among the most popular girls' names in some parishes. It has always been particularly popular in Scotland and northern England (borne, for example, by Grace Darling , the lighthouse keeper's daughter whose heroism in 1838 , saving sailors in a storm, caught the popular imagination). In more recent times it was famous as the name of the actress Grace Kelly ( 1928–82 ), who became Princess Grace of Monaco. In Ireland it is used as an Anglicized form of Gráinne .

en.lifeSummary: When Grace Sherman was born on 18 June 1615, in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Edmund Sherman, was 44 and her mother, Grace Makin, was 38. She married John Livermore Sr. in 1632, in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 12 January 1690, in Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 74, and was buried in Forefathers Burial Ground, Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

ko.lifeSummary: Grace Sherman(이)가 1615년 6월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 데드함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Sherman(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Grace Makin(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1632년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에서 John Livermore Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1690년 1월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 헬스퍼드에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 헬스퍼드 포레팻헤르스 버이앨 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Grace Sherman nasceu em 18 de junho de 1615, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edmund Sherman, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Grace Makin, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com John Livermore Sr. em 1632, em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de janeiro de 1690, em Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Forefathers Burial Ground, Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Grace Sherman родилась 18 июня 1615 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Edmund Sherman было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Grace Makin, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Livermore Sr. в 1632 г. в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 12 января 1690 г. в местности челмсфорд, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности форефатирс буряль гроунд, челмсфорд, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

Se casó con John Livermore Sr. en 1632, en Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 8 hijas.
